evals.prompt: Read this selected Figma dashboard frame and give me the real components, tokens, layout constraints, and implementation notes.
evals.expected_output: Produces a read-only context brief, labels Figma metadata versus inference, and avoids claiming runtime evidence.

evals.prompt: I only have a screenshot from Figma, no MCP connection. Summarize what can and cannot be known.
evals.expected_output: Uses screenshot/manual evidence only and clearly marks missing Figma metadata.
